papers_mined.title: Qanat Wikipedia Persian Water Supply
papers_mined.note: Qanat: underground aqueduct tunnel collecting from alluvial aquifer + mother well + regular vent/spoil shafts; gravity-driven multi-km flow; downstream jubs surface canals + kariz urban distribution; 30,000 active in Iran.

papers_mined.title: Ab Anbar Wikipedia Cistern
papers_mined.note: Ab anbar: traditional reservoir below ground level + sarooj mortar (sand+clay+egg+lime+goat hair+ash); wind-tower cooling via qanat-fed air pressure differential; cool 25C summer water.
